subject:
Re: Any experiences with using Warp through a Windows virtual machine
 with GPU passthrough?
body:
Hi Dennis,

I set something like this up for my postdoc lab (I think ~2018), so my info
and recollection isn't the best. It had 2 GPUs, and it was configured so
that one of the GPUs could be detached and run as  GPU for WARP. It kind of
works, but honestly, if I was setting something up now, I would go with
Windows. My configuration was clunky and slow compared with other setups.

Thanks,
Jess

On Thu, Oct 6, 2022 at 9:35 AM Dennis Michalak <dennisjmichalak@gmail.com>
wrote:

> I'd be interested in hearing about others' experience with trying to run
> Warp through a Windows virtual machine on a Linux system with GPU
> passthrough. I'm putting together a cryoET workstation and would like to
> know if something like this could work, and if it does, what needs to be
> done to make it work.
>
> Best,
> Dennis
>
